lead_profile_text: STL Switch — Overseas Owner (Switzerland). 3 bed semi, Wembley HA9. No mortgage. STL net ~£39,235/yr. Mother moved to retirement property leaving house empty. Target May/June for Wembley concert season.
emotional_profile: Analytical overseas owner evaluating 3 providers simultaneously; valued transparency and manageable portfolio size; cautious but financially well-placed with no mortgage pressure
delay_trigger_phrases: want to see how it goes

top_objections.text: Speaking with 2 other providers — competitive evaluation underway
Refurb not complete by deadline — new boiler, laminate flooring, repainting needed
New boiler and smart thermostat decisions still pending

top_questions.text: What is the management fee and can it be reduced?
top_questions.answer: 13% if signed by end of April — standard rate is higher

top_questions.text: How does remote management work for an overseas owner based in Switzerland?
top_questions.answer: Full remote management handled by Stayful team; smart thermostat recommended for remote control

what_moved_them: No mortgage means all STL income is pure profit
Concert season demand — Wembley events driving occupancy and nightly rates
Remote management capability suited to Swiss-based owner
Transparency of operations and manageable portfolio size (~70 properties)

conversion_gaps.gap: Competing provider evaluation — did not differentiate strongly enough to end comparison
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Re-approach if competitor underperforms; strong profile — no mortgage, overseas owner, concert season timing

conversion_gaps.gap: Refurb timeline pressure created hesitation before onboarding
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Offer flexible start date post-refurb; decouple signing from onboarding timeline

offer_framing: 13% management fee if signed by end of April — reduced from standard to capture Wembley concert season window
